title: NJIT PHYS 681 Spring 2026: Solar Physics and Instruments Teaching Visualizations
description: A subset of the NJIT PHYS 681 Spring 2026 Solar Physics and Instruments teaching materials, containing interactive static HTML visualizations and narrative notes for solar physics, emission, propagation, interferometry, and instrumentation topics: radiometry, radiative transfer, magnetoionic propagation, emission mechanisms, plasma emission, ECM, gyrosynchrotron emission, bremsstrahlung, radio interferometry, and instrumentation.
